projectDescription: A web-based bank branch queue management system that replaces physical lines with virtual appointment reservations, enforcing identity-linked turn assignment and configurable withdrawal frequency controls.
keyFeatures: Identity-linked turn reservation using Cuban CI validation
Configurable frequency control (anti-scalping) with automatic blocking periods
Daily configuration calendar with per-service monto, limits and ticket quota
Hierarchical role system: Super Admin, Admin, Supervisor, Operator
Full audit trail with IP anonymization (SHA-256 + mask)
Printable official turn list and Excel export for custodians
Optimistic and pessimistic locking for concurrent turn assignment
Operates fully offline on local network (LAN)
Rate limiting on public CI entry and reservation endpoints
CSRF protection and bcrypt/argon2 password hashing
publicApiSurface: POST /ingreso/procesar — Process CI and start session
POST /cliente-datos — Submit client data and confirm reservation
GET /admin/turnos/hoy — Today's turn list with mark-as-used
